---
title: ""
format: html
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: blog
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [title, date]
    max-items: 5
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-image}
![](images/profile.jpg){alt="Volkan Işık"}
:::

::: {.hero-content}
# Assoc. Prof. Dr. Volkan Isik

::: {.name-subtitle}
Hacettepe University
:::

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Labour Economics | Social Policy | Social Entrepreneurship
:::

::: {.hero-affiliation}
A scholar working at the intersection of labour markets, social policy, and inclusive development. My work brings together academic research, teaching, and field-based policy experience.
:::

::: {.hero-email}
<span><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr</span>
<span class="contact-info"><i class="bi bi-telephone"></i>Office: +90 312 311 60 15 - 129</span>
<span class="contact-info"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>Ankara, Turkiye</span>
:::

::: {.hero-links}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/do%C3%A7-dr-volkan-%C4%B1%C5%9F%C4%B1k-79150bbb/){target="_blank" .hero-link-chip}
[Twitter](https://x.com/volkannisik){target="_blank" .hero-link-chip}
[Avesis](https://avesis.hacettepe.edu.tr/volkani){target="_blank" .hero-link-chip}
[Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/ADT-9246-2022){target="_blank" .hero-link-chip}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3690-969X){target="_blank" .hero-link-chip}
:::

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View CV](./cv.html){.main-btn}
[Publications](./publications.html){.secondary-btn}
[Recent Writing](./blog.html){.ghost-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.highlight-grid}
::: {.highlight-card}
### Research Focus
Labour market transitions, social entrepreneurship ecosystems, occupational health and safety, and evidence-based employment policy.
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### Teaching and Training
Courses, workshops, and project-based learning in labour economics, social policy, human resources, and applied research methods.
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### Projects and Collaboration
Open to academic partnerships, consultancy, invited lectures, and interdisciplinary projects with public, private, and civil society institutions.
:::
:::

::: {.section-shell}
## Academic Profile

With more than 18 years of academic and professional experience, I work on questions around employment, inclusion, and social innovation. My recent work connects labour market analysis with practical policy design, especially for disadvantaged groups, vocational education, and the future of work.

::: {.stat-row}
::: {.stat-card}
### 18+
Years of academic and professional experience
:::

::: {.stat-card}
### 3
Core fields: labour economics, social policy, social entrepreneurship
:::

::: {.stat-card}
### International
Research, EU projects, and applied policy collaborations
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section-shell}
## Explore the Site

::: {.quick-links}
[Research Publications](./publications.html){.quick-link-card}
[Curriculum Vitae](./cv.html){.quick-link-card}
[Teaching and Lectures](./lectures.html){.quick-link-card}
[Events and Activities](./events.html){.quick-link-card}
[Data Lab Projects](./datalab.html){.quick-link-card}
[Podcasts and Media](./podcasts.html){.quick-link-card}
:::
:::

## Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::
